# Swim-By

A swimming courses business focused on teaching swimming skills. The brand centers around aquatic education, likely emphasizing safety, skill development, and confidence in the water. The specific audience, teaching approach, and unique differentiators are yet to be defined.

Swim-By — Aquatic Education

# Swimming Courses That BuildSkill, Safety & Confidence


### Swim-By helps adults, seniors, fitness-focused learners, and performance-driven swimmers feel stronger and more capable in the water through guided instruction and clear progression.


Start Your Swim Journey

Explore Courses




























Our Courses

## Courses designed forwhere you are now.


Whether you're entering the pool for the first time, returning after years away, training for fitness, or polishing technique — Swim-By offers structured beginner swim lessons and advanced programmes with supportive progression at every stage.

Explore All Courses












### Adult Beginner Foundations


A calm, structured introduction to the water for adults who have never swum before or feel uncertain in the pool. We build breath control, buoyancy, and basic strokes at your pace.



Suits: first-time adult swimmers & those returning to water













### Water Safety & Confidence


Essential water awareness and survival skills for those who want to feel safe and confident in aquatic environments — pools, open water, or recreational swimming.



Suits: all ages seeking aquatic safety awareness












### Senior Wellness Swimming


Low-impact aquatic sessions designed to improve mobility, joint health, and cardiovascular wellbeing. A gentle, affirming environment for older adults seeking lifetime fitness swimming.



Suits: older adults prioritising mobility & gentle fitness












### Stroke Technique & Performance


Precision coaching for swimmers looking to refine their freestyle, backstroke, breaststroke, or butterfly. Video analysis and drill-based sessions sharpen form and build speed.



Suits: intermediate to advanced swimmers & fitness athletes

Real Stories

## What swimmers feelafter they begin


From first-time beginners to returning swimmers — here's what our students say about their journey with Swim-By.













I avoided the water for fifteen years after a bad experience as a child. Within three sessions at Swim-By, I was floating on my back and actually enjoying it. The instructor never rushed me — they just quietly built my confidence until the fear simply wasn't there anymore.







## Your Heading Here






### Card Title 1


Card description text goes here







### Card Title 2


Card description text goes here







### Card Title 3


Card description text goes here









MR


Margaret R.
Adult Beginner · Age 42

















My doctor suggested low-impact exercise and swimming was the answer. Swim-By gave me a programme that matched my pace completely. My breathing has improved and I leave every session feeling lighter than when I arrived.




DK


David K.
Active Senior · Age 67














I wanted to shave seconds off my freestyle time. The stroke analysis sessions were incredibly precise — my coach identified a hip rotation issue I'd had for years. Two months in and I've dropped four seconds off my 100m personal best.




SL


Sofia L.
Competitive Swimmer · Age 28














Supportive instruction




Confidence-building progress




Skill-focused learning




Water safety first





















Why Swim-By


## Built on progressyou can feel.


Every beginner swim lesson at Swim-By is structured around real milestones — so you always know where you are, and where you're going next.


















### Step-by-Step


A structured curriculum that builds each skill on the last — no rushing, no skipping ahead.








### Safety First


Water safety is woven into every session — from breath control to confident self-rescue.








### Technique-Led


Proper form from day one — because good habits in the water build lifetime fitness swimming skills.








### Every Level


Welcoming support for complete beginners through to swimmers refining competitive stroke mechanics.
















## See the Journey in Motion


Swim-By combines calm instruction, focused practice, and visible progression so every session feels purposeful — whether you're taking your first beginner swim lessons or refining an established technique.










### Building Comfort


Every journey begins at the water's edge — calm, supported, and entirely at your pace.












### Refining Form


Focused technique practice that turns effort into effortless movement through the water.










### Swimming with Confidence


The reward of consistent progress — moving through the lane with strength and ease.
























## Ready to Begin Your Swimming Journey


Reach out to learn which Swim-By course best matches your level, goals, and comfort in the water. Whether you’re exploring beginner swim lessons or building toward a lifetime fitness swimming routine, we’ll help you find the perfect starting point.













### Beginner-Friendly Support


No experience required. Our courses welcome complete beginners and nervous swimmers alike. Every session is designed to build comfort and safety before technique — so you always feel supported from the first stroke.










### Clear Skill Progression


Swim-By courses follow a structured progression so you always know where you are and where you’re headed. Each milestone builds naturally on the last, giving you a clear path from your first lesson to confident, independent swimming.










### Confidence-First Teaching


Progress begins with a conversation. We take time to understand your goals and any hesitations before you ever enter the water. Our instructors prioritise your confidence at every stage, making each session feel like a personal achievement.

# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  4/26/2026



Swim-By ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Swim-By

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  April 26, 2026



Swim-By is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Swim-By

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  April 26, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Swim-By

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - sports & fitness education provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Swim-By provides sports & fitness education through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Swim-By. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Swim-By

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
